query:
ALTER TABLE `master_skus` 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `descriptionFr` varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `descriptionEn` varchar(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `unitOfMeasure` varchar(32) DEFAULT 'UN',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `maxCapacity` int DEFAULT 1000;

ALTER TABLE `master_bins`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `description` varchar(255),
  MODIFY COLUMN `zone` enum('RECEPTION','PICKING','STOCKAGE','RESERVE','EXPEDITION') DEFAULT 'STOCKAGE';

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `descriptionEn` varchar(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `unitOfMeasure` varchar(32) DEFAULT 'UN',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `maxCapacity` int DEFAULT 1000;

ALTER TABLE `master_bins`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `description` varchar(255),
  MODIFY COLUMN `zone` enum('RECEPTION','PICKING','STOCKAGE','RESERVE','EXPEDITION') DEFAULT 'STOCKAGE';
